SOURCE: 19850482.pdf
IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (19850482.pdf)
SUMMARY: Experienced technology leader with a strong background in managing all aspects of front and back office systems, particularly in the Financial Services Industry. Skilled in leadership, project management, and IT security.
SKILLS: Technology Leadership, Project Management, IT Security, Budgeting & Operational Cost, Team-Building, Training, & Leadership, Goal-Setting & Business Planning, Policy & Procedure Creation, Conflict Resolution & Management, Productivity, Efficiency, & Performance Improvements, Data Center Operations, Operating Systems: Windows 7, XP, Server 2013, 2008, 2003, Microsoft Active Directory, SharePoint, Exchange, Server: 2003, 2007, 2013, VM Ware, Trend Micro, Cisco Infrastructure Routers and Switches, Palo Alto, EMC storage solutions, Market Data & Trading Systems: Open Bloomberg and Server API, FactSet, Fidessa, Tethys, Lava, LEK, ICE, Tradeware, Reuters Eikon, Thomson One, Reuters Station, Instinet, NASDAQ Trader, Advent

SOURCE: 19850482.pdf
JOB TITLE: Senior VP - Information Technology
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Managed IT operations for a global institutional sales and trading firm. Led the relocation of NYC office to new space, managed data center implementation, and implemented VM environment.

SOURCE: 19850482.pdf
JOB TITLE: Chief Information Officer
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Managed technology for an institutional trading firm specializing in Fixed Income and Equities products. Implemented disaster recovery plan, negotiated vendor contracts, and upgraded network infrastructure.

SOURCE: 19850482.pdf
JOB TITLE: IT Support Manager
COMPANY: 
DATES: 
DESCRIPTION: Managed IT support for a firm with 8 branch offices. Implemented market data software and hardware upgrades, managed backups, and coordinated vendor interactions.
